pages.title: Mage
pages.text: Combat primary. Built around the Wizards mod. Twenty-seven items, flat — one Mage casts all three schools: arcane, fire, frost.

pages.title: Catalogue
pages.text: $(bold)Wands and staves.$(/) Apprentice-tier focuses and two-handed casters across all three schools.$(br2)$(bold)Robes.$(/) Four sets — Wizard, Arcane, Fire, Frost — head, chest, legs, feet. Each set's recipe uses its school's signature block (lapis, amethyst, magma, prismarine).$(br2)$(bold)Spell books.$(/) Arcane, Fire, Frost. The Mage class is the only source — these have no recipe outside it.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: Netherite, ruby, and smaragdant wand and staff variants stay vanilla smithing upgrades from the bases you craft.$(br2)The matching trader is the Wizard. Non-Mages who want this gear pay runes there.
